_meta.source: Aggregated from research dossier; primary keyword metrics from Semrush phrase_this (live 2026-05-15, US); SERP positions from phrase_organic; cluster volumes per context-file and Semrush.
_meta.revision: 2026-05-15 revision pass after adversarial FAIL — three CRITICAL items addressed: (1) path_comparison numbers replaced with sourced values; diy_build_weeks dropped (gmongaras says 'a few weeks', no exact number); diy_gpu_cost_usd:400 dropped (no source) and replaced with hourly marketplace rate; off_the_shelf_monthly_usd:20 replaced with verified range $12.99–$15.99. (2) category_stats added with PRIMARY sources for Replika 10M, Character.AI $150M, Stanford study; sibling claim of '48% loneliness' was incorrect — paper actually says 90% any-loneliness / 43% Severely Lonely; Character.AI was Series A March 2023, not Series B Feb 2024. (3) Surprising-findings block in prose now contains 3 SERP-derived insights with URLs.
_meta.notes: phrase_related and phrase_questions remain quota-blocked; deep research (Perplexity) returned empty briefing — see -deep.md. Quora/Reddit/Kupid still 403'd on direct fetch.

sources.path_comparison.off_the_shelf_minutes: Nomi.ai / RomanticAI / Candy.ai signup-flow inspection (5-step character creation, ~10 min total)
sources.category_stats.replika_play_store_instal: https://app.sensortower.com/news-feed/ai-friend-app-replika-reaches-10-million-on-google-play/62bc87140d41df403960eb59 (Sensor Tower) reinforced by https://x.com/ETtech/status/1863423564004602074 (ETtech Nov 2024 — 10M downloads + $25M H1 2024 revenue)
sources.category_stats.stanford_replika_sample_n: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10955814/ (Cerit et al., Stanford Graduate School of Education, npj Mental Health Research, Jan 2024)
sources.category_stats.stanford_any_loneliness_s: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10955814/ ('90% of the participant population experienced loneliness')
sources.category_stats.stanford_severely_lonely_: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10955814/ ('43% qualified as Severely or Very Severely Lonely')

dropped_for_lack_of_source: diy_build_weeks:3 — gmongaras only says 'a few weeks'; replaced with verbatim phrase rather than fabricated integer
diy_gpu_cost_usd:400 — no source could be located for a $400 figure; replaced with hourly marketplace rate ($0.72/hr A100 80GB Vast.ai)
off_the_shelf_monthly_usd:20 — no top-5 SERP product publishes $20/mo; replaced with verified range $12.99–$15.99 from Candy.ai and Nomi.ai
stanford_increased_loneliness_share:0.48 — does not appear in the actual paper; replaced with the paper's real numbers (0.90 any-loneliness, 0.43 severely-lonely)
